title: Creamy Italian Pasta Bake
description: A comforting, creamy pasta bake with a tangy kick, inspired by Italian flavors.

ingredients.name: italian
ingredients.notes: dried herbs like oregano and basil

instructions: Cook pasta according to package instructions until al dente.
In a large skillet, combine chili, Italian seasoning, salt, and pepper.
Stir in tangy and creamy ingredients until smooth.
Combine cooked pasta and chili mixture in a large bowl.
Transfer to a baking dish and top with additional Italian seasoning if desired.
Bake for 20-25 minutes or until hot and bubbly.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
